action.reasoning: Observation: Val peak 0.7576 (test AUC 0.7551) in iter11 vs overall best test 0.7563; loss to ~0.497 with post-peak overfitting despite ES; iter time ~60s leaves ~20min. Analysis: Current embedded DKT solid but train.py save dict truncated (risk to predict.py), lower LR + tuned WD/droput/embed for better opt/generalization; full clean code rewrite prevents bugs. Decision: Overwrite model.py/train.py/predict.py with complete consistent versions (full hparam save, robust ES/scheduler, arg parsing, matching inference), new params (h=1024,e=128,d=0.5,lr=1e-4,wd=1e-4,epochs=60,es=15,sch=5); train then submit_eval on best.
